FamilyMember.title: Family Member
FamilyMember.description: A profile for a family member within the network. Access is restricted to the family owner identified by the ownerId field.

photoUrl.description: URL to the member's profile photo.

ownerId.description: The UID of the shared family account owner.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: A record of a household expense. Access is restricted to the family owner identified by the ownerId field. Queries must filter by ownerId.

ownerId.description: The UID of the shared family account owner.

FamilySettings.title: Family Settings
FamilySettings.description: Global settings for a family account. Document ID is the owner's UID.

ownerId.description: The UID of the shared family account owner.

/members/{memberId}.description: Collection of family members. Only the owner (ownerId) can read or write documents.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Collection of household expenses. Access is restricted to users with matching ownerId field.

/settings/{userId}.description: Family-specific configuration. Only the user with matching UID can access this document.
